name: King's Bounty: Warriors of the North
short_description: King’s Bounty: Warriors of the North is a standalone entry of the beloved tactical RPG series set in the world of The Legend, generations after its events. You will lead a Viking hero, wield Rune Magic, command Valkyries, and defend the northern lands of Endoria from an undead invasion.
detailed_description:
Premium edition

Premium edition includes Dark Side Cookies bonus DLC that features:

  • Clot of Darkness amulet providing bonus to money and experience
  • Two additional locations
  • Over a dozen additional quests and a new unit


About the Game

King’s Bounty: Warriors of the North is a standalone entry in the King’s Bounty series and a narrative follow-up set in the same world as King’s Bounty: The Legend. A generation has passed since the events of the original adventure, but peace in Endoria has proven fragile.

From the frozen northern lands, a new threat rises. An undead army spreads across the region, pushing ever closer to the heart of the kingdom. You play as Olaf, a Viking warrior and the youngest son of Tormund the Fierce, tasked with defending his homeland and stopping the advance of the dead.

What begins as a local conflict soon turns into a full-scale campaign across the northern reaches of Endoria. You must liberate the land of Nordig, travel between icy islands, ancient strongholds, and war-torn territories, and carefully prepare your army for increasingly dangerous encounters.

Exploration takes place in real time across a large hand-crafted world, while battles unfold in deep, turn-based tactical combat. Positioning, morale, unit synergy, and preparation are critical, as enemies grow stronger and mistakes become harder to recover from.

Warriors of the North expands the tactical core of the series with Rune Magic, a new system that allows units to expend runes for powerful temporary bonuses in battle. These effects can turn the tide of combat when used at the right moment, adding a new layer of strategic decision-making.

Olaf is not alone in his campaign. He is aided by five Valkyries, powerful companions who grant unique bonuses and abilities. Choosing how to rely on their strengths becomes an important part of long-term strategy, both on the battlefield and throughout progression.

The northern setting introduces new Viking-inspired units such as Berserkers and Skalds, enhanced Rage mechanics, and a campaign built around constant escalation. With its darker tone, expanded systems, and distinct identity, King’s Bounty: Warriors of the North delivers a deeper and more demanding tactical experience that builds on the legacy of The Legend while offering a fresh strategic focus.

Standalone Viking campaign

Experience a new chapter in the world of Endoria, focused on the frozen northern lands and an undead invasion.

  • Play as Olaf, a Viking hero

Lead the youngest son of Tormund the Fierce and liberate Nordig from the forces of the dead.

  • Rune Magic system

A new tactical layer that lets units spend runes for powerful temporary bonuses during combat.

  • Five Valkyrie companions

Strategic companions that provide unique bonuses and abilities, shaping both battles and long-term planning.

  • New Viking-inspired units and enhanced Rage mechanics

Command Berserkers, Skalds, and other northern units designed for aggressive, momentum-driven combat.

  • Large hand-crafted northern world

Explore icy islands, ancient fortresses, and war-torn regions filled with quests, secrets, and challenging encounters.

  • Deep turn-based tactical combat

Battles reward positioning, unit synergy, smart use of runes, and careful preparation over brute force.
